## Problem and scope

Describe the problem, affected maturity level, and why this belongs in the reusable Skill.

## Evidence and change

List sources, fixtures, rule IDs, files, and the narrow claim this change can support.

## Validation

- [ ] `python tools/validate_repository.py` passes
- [ ] Positive and negative fixtures cover new deterministic behavior
- [ ] New references are directly routed from `SKILL.md`
- [ ] No private paths, customer data, credentials, proprietary CAD, or restricted standards content
- [ ] Limitations and required human approval are explicit
